title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at TVS Motor

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at TVS Motor
jsonLd.description:
TVS Motor is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!
